generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how our current security laws leave gaps that extremists exploit. We need to empower our agencies with modern tools to detect and prevent threats before they materialize. The civil liberties debate is important, but in an age of asymmetric threats, we can't afford to tie our hands behind our backs. #NationalSecurityFirst
